nonGoals: Do NOT modify any struct literal construction sites (87 found across pipeline.go, store.go, store_test.go, applier_test.go, workspace_snapshot_test.go, architect_test.go, architect_snapshot_test.go, pr_test.go, report/*_test.go, certifier_test.go)
Do NOT update recordJSON or toJSON/fromJSON in store.go
Do NOT add or modify any test file
Do NOT touch any other struct, type, or package
Do NOT add GradeNA or any other field — Unsupported bool only
objective: Add `Unsupported bool` with JSON tag `"unsupported"` to the CertificationRecord struct in the Result block, between Confidence and Dimensions
planText:
In internal/domain/record.go, locate the CertificationRecord struct. Find the Result comment block containing Confidence and Dimensions. Insert:

    Unsupported bool   `json:"unsupported"`

on its own line between the Confidence field line and the Dimensions field line. The zero value (false) is correct for all existing construction sites — no struct literals, tests, or serialization paths need modification. This is purely additive.
